classObjective: Find the coordinate of a point located at a fractional distance between two given points on a number line.
workedExamples: 10-5, Example 1 — Locate Points Using Fractional Distances on a Number Line
10-5, Example 2 — Real-World Problems with Fractional Distances and Ratios
warmUp: What coordinate is 3/4 of the way from 0 to 8?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: A + fraction*(B-A) formula; fractional distance along a number line; ratio-based partitioning
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice finding points at fractional distances on number lines
independentPractice: Practice problems finding coordinates at fractional distances in real-world contexts
assessment: Exit ticket: find the point that is 2/3 of the way from 3 to 12 on a number line
capReflection: How does the fractional distance formula A + fraction*(B-A) generalize the midpoint formula?
